markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on SEO strategy for Anything to accelerate growth.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Anything's SEO ROI is too slow for its aggressive growth goals ($8M → $10-12M ARR) and limited runway. The current 5-articles/week strategy is insufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2861.0)
  - [**Solution:** Adopt a high-volume, signals-based strategy (10-15 articles/week) to accelerate learning and prove ROI faster, accepting lower initial quality for speed.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
  - [**Critical Blocker:** Consolidate all domains (`create.xyz`, `createanything.com`) to `anything.com` to unify authority and eliminate duplicate content issues.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [**Future Bet:** Explore a programmatic content project (e.g., app teardowns, business ideas) to create unique, high-value assets that integrate with the product.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)

## Topics

### The Growth Mandate & SEO ROI Challenge

  - [**Context:** Anything grew from $0 → $2M ARR organically post-Series A. Now at $8M ARR, the goal is $10-12M in the next few months.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** The current SEO strategy's ROI is too slow for the company's aggressive growth mandate and limited runway.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2861.0)
  - [**Goal Mismatch:** A recent GrowthX team transition led to a disconnect from the original goal of fast, innovative growth, creating a perception of a "defeatist" approach.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### High-Volume, Signals-Based Editorial Strategy

  - [**Current State:** 11 weeks into the engagement, the 5-articles/week strategy is showing positive but slow growth signals.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Increase output to 10-15 articles/week with less editorial review.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Accelerate learning by testing more content bets.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
      - [**Trade-off:** Accept lower initial quality for speed, with plans to enrich successful content later.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

### Domain Consolidation: A Critical Blocker

  - [**Problem:** Multiple domains (`create.xyz`, `createanything.com`, `anything.com`) dilute authority and create duplicate content issues.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [**Action:** Consolidate all domains to `anything.com` via a clean 301 redirect.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Unifies all SEO value into one powerful asset.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
      - [**Risk:** A temporary traffic dip during re-indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
      - [**Mitigation:** GrowthX has successfully managed similar migrations (e.g., Abnormal Security, OnUpkeep) with recovery in \~2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Programmatic Content: A Future Bet

  - [**Opportunity:** Create unique, high-value content assets that integrate with the Anything product.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [**Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
      - [**App Teardowns:** Analyze popular apps (e.g., HubSpot) to show how they could be rebuilt with Anything.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
      - [**Business Idea Generator:** Pair quantified market research with sample prompts to help users start businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
      - [**Non-Technical Guides:** Create canonical content on topics like "how to get distribution" for non-technical founders.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2653.0)
  - [**Constraint:** This requires a separate scope and engineering effort to build the necessary workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3107.0)
      - [Instruct the team to increase editorial output to 10-15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3107.0)
      - [Scope a plan for consolidating all domains to `anything.com`.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3385.0)
      - [Present a proposal for a programmatic content project.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
  - [**Dhruv (Anything):**](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
      - [Review and approve the high-volume strategy and domain consolidation plan.](https://fathom.video/share/_D3xb2i-mHVcYxDCk9TQK3TygrD-Kx1x?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
